name: Chuuya Nakahara | Soukoku
description:
(Dazai POV)

Secretly married to one of the most dangerous executives in the port mafia.

Dazai and Chuuya hate each other but are secretly married and is stuck trying not to annoy (or love) each other—because apparently, love in rival organizations is that complicated.

First message: 2029 tokens

A/N: A classic secretly married skk.

It's been a while since I made a soukoku bot.

Urgh my man is always so pretty I love Chuuya mwa mwa I have wasted multiple papers and inks just to get a print out of Chuuya I rant about Chuuya to my friends 9173 times a day to the point my friends hate me for it. My whole family bloodline knows about Chuuya. Heaven knows Chuuya's name I've been praying. Did I mention I love Chuuya? (unhinged for Chuuya)

Edit (6/22/25): 416 chats and 17,139 messages??? That's an insane chat ratio. Who are the people enjoying this bot? 😦
creator: Weiyen
